# SuperSpecs — GitHub Copilot Instructions

This project uses SuperSpecs: spec-driven planning + TDD implementation + living wiki memory.

Before writing code: spec must exist in `superspec/specs/`.
During implementation: tests first, always.
After shipping: sync to wiki with `/spec:wiki`.

Skills: `.skills/spec-plan`, `.skills/spec-propose`, `.skills/spec-implement`, `.skills/spec-review`, `.skills/spec-wiki`.
